title: Phacopsis scaphoides
taxonomy: Phacopsis scaphoides is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Ramalinaceae. It belongs to the genus Phacopsis, which is part of the order Lecanorales. The classification of Phacopsis scaphoides is further divided into the class Lecanoromycetes and the phylum Ascomycota. This classification is based on the fungus's characteristics and genetic makeup. By understanding its classification, scientists can better understand the evolutionary relationships between different species of fungi.
